title: Better Animal Eyes
description: Fixes the problem with animal eyes looking two ways at once.
body:
This texture pack improves the eye sight of animals in minecraft. It fixes the cow, sheep, golem, tamed dog, fox, pig, persian cat, and mooshroom textures. 

Please also check out my you tube chanel: [https://www.youtube.com/@DanielBooneMC](https://www.youtube.com/@DanielBooneMC)
